summary: Applied ADR 0228 on the live Windmill control plane by seeding every repo-managed workflow wrapper into the `lv3` workspace, hardening the worker checkout and wrapper runtime paths from the latest `origin/main` base, replaying `make converge-windmill`, and re-verifying representative browser/API-first operations through the proxied Windmill endpoint.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_nightly_integration_tests.py tests/test_weekly_capacity_report_windmill.py tests/test_ansible_collection_packaging.py tests/test_windmill_default_operations_surface.py tests/test_token_lifecycle_windmill.py -q` passed with `17 passed in 0.74s`, and `python3 -m py_compile config/windmill/scripts/nightly-integration-tests.py config/windmill/scripts/weekly-capacity-report.py config/windmill/scripts/collection-publish.py config/windmill/scripts/audit-token-inventory.py config/windmill/scripts/token-exposure-response.py` passed.

verification.check: Repo automation and validation gates from the isolated worktree
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-windmill`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0228-live-apply` while the workstream remained active in `workstreams.yaml`.

`make validate` was exercised from the isolated worktree and reached the canonical-truth guard before failing with `Canonical truth is stale. Run uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/canonical_truth.py --write. - README.md`. That is the expected protected-file holdback on this branch because the top-level README integrated status summary must wait for the final merge-to-main step.

After rebasing onto `origin/main` commit `cc80b12d`, `make converge-windmill` completed successfully twice from this worktree: first from branch head `8d9b6c10` to prove the seeded default-surface contract and then again from branch head `a3de885c` after hardening the token lifecycle wrappers. The final replay log `.local/ws-0228/converge-windmill-token-wrapper.log` finished with `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=236 changed=43`, `postgres-lv3 ok=63 changed=1`, and `proxmox-host ok=37 changed=7`, and it included both `Verify the Windmill default operations scripts are seeded` and `Assert the Windmill default operations scripts exist`.

`curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer ..." http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/version` returned `CE v1.662.0`, and live metadata GETs through `/api/w/lv3/scripts/get/p/...` returned `{"path": "f/lv3/post_merge_gate", "language": "python3", "summary": "Post-merge validation gate"}` plus `{"path": "f/lv3/maintenance_window", "language": "python3", "summary": "ADR 0080 maintenance window"}`.

Using `scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py` against `http://100.64.0.1:8005`, `f/lv3/weekly_capacity_report` returned `status: ok` with `metrics_source: disabled`, `f/lv3/audit_token_inventory` returned `status: ok` with `7` healthy tokens and receipt `receipts/token-lifecycle/20260328T201215Z-audit-token-inventory.json`, and dry-run `f/lv3/token_exposure_response` for `local-platform-cli` returned `status: completed` with incident `receipts/security-incidents/token-exposure-20260328T201237Z-local-platform-cli.json`.

notes: The first representative live executions on this rebased branch exposed two real worker gaps: `weekly_capacity_report` still needed a PyYAML fallback path on the worker, and `audit_token_inventory` still failed when concurrent checkout churn left `receipts/token-lifecycle` read-only. Branch commits `8d9b6c10` and `a3de885c` repaired those gaps before the final replay recorded here.

Long-running unrelated Windmill playbook processes from other workstreams were still visible on the controller during this branch. The final token lifecycle wrapper hardening makes the receipt and incident directories self-heal at job runtime so the representative workflows remain usable even when concurrent checkout syncs reset repo-backed modes.

Protected integration files remain intentionally unchanged on this workstream branch: `VERSION`, release sections in `changelog.md`, canonical observed state in `versions/stack.yaml`, the top-level README integrated status summary, and ADR 0228 final repo-version attribution. The merge-to-main step still needs to update those protected files plus the ADR metadata with the official first merged repo version.
Because those protected canonical-truth files stay untouched here, the full `make validate` path currently stops at the expected stale-README guard rather than reaching a branch-local green exit.
